name: pcs-promo-creation
description: Guided end-to-end PCS promo pipeline: parse a vendor deck -> build NetSuite kit imports -> create Jira promotion tasks, with a Yes/No confirmation before each stage and the existing hard PROM write-protection at the Jira step. Orchestrates pcs-promo-parser and pcs-jira-task-builder and drives the Kit Builder `kb` CLI (>= 0.5.21); Claude writes each kit's Page Title (95-char cap, every member SKU kept, 'Kit' filler dropped) and Detailed Description from the item data using the ported title/description rules. v1.8.0: Stage-1 validation enforces the parser's new verification gate — it re-matches every emitted SKU to the vendor regex, asserts no `unverified`-held SKU leaked into an output, reconciles `SKUs Held`, and surfaces verification-held items (blocked from the Promo-List) at Gate 2. v1.7.0: requires kb >= 0.5.21 (which collapses duplicate kit members that share an Item ID); the Step 0 prereq check uses `pip show pcs-kit-builder-lite` (the CLI has no `kb --version`). v1.6.0: the DECODE formula is presented as a copy-paste artifact in chat (one Copy button per block), alongside the backup decode_blocks.txt. v1.5.0: a run now lands in one session folder `Parsed Decks/<Vendor>/<Vendor>-<QN>-<YYYY>-<MM-DD>/` with three subfolders — Promo Parsed Output / NetSuite Import Files / Images; the drag-and-drop upload widget is recreated on every file (re)prompt; the parser's For-Review workbook is surfaced at the kit gate; the kit stage is skipped when there are no kit promos. v1.4.0: kit images are composed locally via a `kb --images-only` one-liner (macOS + Windows) since Cowork's sandbox can't reach NetSuite's image host. Prompts for file uploads (deck PDF, pricing cheat sheet, NetSuite Promo Kit Support export) when needed.
